title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Patek Philippe International Holdings Limited
body: "Application number 5271  Applicant Patek Philippe Salon Limited objected to the name used by Patek Philippe International Holdings Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Patek Philippe International Holdings Limited is changed to 16025879, Ltd. "
